purpose: A free-text input that creates tokens. User types and presses Enter (or comma) to create a removable token. Used for tags, email lists, comma-separated free entry.
whenToUse: When values are not from a predefined list
For input where order matters and items are user-defined
whenNotToUse: When values come from a fixed list — use MultiComboBox
doRules: Show clear hint that Enter or comma creates a token
Validate each token format if applicable (email, number, etc.)
dontRules: Do not allow duplicates if uniqueness matters
Do not lose typed text on focus loss without warning

layoutGuidance.alignment: Tokens flow inline; wrap to next row.

accessibilityGuidance.requirement: Enter creates token; Backspace removes last; arrow keys navigate tokens

exceptions: enableMultiLineMode=true allows tokens to wrap multiple lines
